tier: Tier 7.7j - Capacity Sham-Separation / State-Specificity Scoring Gate
claim: Tier 7.7j scored the locked state-specificity diagnostic and classified the Lorenz high-capacity signal as low_rank_collapse_confirmed: candidate and probe states stayed near participation ratio 2 despite larger nominal capacity, while target/time shuffles separated and readout concentration did not explain the failure.
caveat: Diagnostic scoring evidence only; not a repair, not a mechanism promotion, not a baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, not external-baseline superiority, and not broad public usefulness evidence.
